hero.description1: Engineering high-performance, accessible, and scalable products

projects.subtitle: Featured Case Studies

cloudDrive.title: Cloud Drive
cloudDrive.description: A comprehensive cloud storage platform designed for modern teams, featuring real-time synchronization, granular sharing controls, and blazing-fast upload capabilities.

messengerPro.title: Messenger Pro
messengerPro.description: A modern real-time messaging application built for speed and reliability, featuring typing indicators, read receipts, and seamless group conversations.

ats.description: Applicant Tracking System seamlessly integrating Careers, HR, and Employee workflows.

projectsTeam.title: Projects and Team
projectsTeam.description: Project management tool to streamline workflows and task management.

jwtAuth.title: JWT Authentication
jwtAuth.description: A powerful template and intuitive authentication tool based on RSA key-pair algorithm.

nextBoilerplate.title: Next Boilerplate
nextBoilerplate.description: Accelerate projects with pre-configured components and utilities.

features.search: Advanced search functionality with intelligent filters

projects.heroDesc: I've worked on tons of projects over the years but these are the ones that I'm most proud of. Many of them are open-source, so if you see something that piques your interest, check out the code.
projects.repositoriesDesc: List of Honorable Projects on Github

about.subtitle: More About Me
about.intro: My name is Alex Chen. Engineer, Problem Solver, Tech Fanatic and a loving Human.
about.p1: A Software Engineer passionate about creating beautiful products that empower people. I thrive on solving complex problems with clean, efficient code. My expertise spans JavaScript, Typescript, React.js, Node.js, Next.js, and Python.
about.p2: I specialize in creating user-friendly interfaces, building RESTful APIs, implementing microservice architecture, and seamlessly integrating external services. My expertise lies in translating business requirements into technical solutions.
about.p3: I can help bring your dream product to life in the virtual world, whether it's crafting sleek websites for businesses or building your dream tech product. I believe in waking up each day eager to make a difference!
about.experienceDesc: Experience That Brings Ideas to Life
about.experienceSub: Years of experience in software development, excelling in innovative solutions and optimizing user experiences.

experience.bullet1_1: Redesigned the company's client dashboard from an outdated layout to a modern, customizable interface, reduced page load time.
experience.bullet1_2: Engineered an AI-powered automation system, generating clustered reports and reducing manual processing time.
experience.bullet1_3: Optimized database pipelines and indexes to enhance system performance and query latency.
experience.bullet2_1: Architected enterprise-level products including cloud-based file storage and real-time project management.
experience.bullet2_2: Migrated legacy interfaces built with HTML/CSS/PHP to React and Express using micro-frontend architecture.
experience.bullet2_3: Resolved critical software bugs and improved system performance.

hire.subtitle: Hey there! Let's make software and solve problems together.
hire.intro: I'm all about making technology work for you and cracking complex problems. Picture me as your go-to software superhero, ready to tackle challenges head-on and transform them into clever solutions.
hire.intro2: I'm not just a coder; I'm here to enhance, speed up, and amplify your projects. When you bring me on board, you're partnering with someone who's devoted to making everything run smoothly and efficiently.

customSoftware.title: Custom software development
customSoftware.desc: From ground-up creation to revamping existing projects, I bring expertise across languages and frameworks to shape your software solution.

processEnhancement.title: Development process enhancement
processEnhancement.desc: Elevate your software workflow with modern CI/CD, Git practices, GitHub Actions, and IaC. Streamlining manual processes is my expertise.

codeReview.title: Code review
codeReview.desc: From code quality tools to encapsulation and beyond, I conduct comprehensive code reviews and offer improvements for maintainability.

fullStack.title: Full Stack development
fullStack.desc: I've worked across a wide spectrum of technologies and platforms: backend, frontend, microservices, and cloud native development.

designSystem.title: Design system development
designSystem.desc: Building upon existing tools or crafting custom design systems, I bring substantial experience in component libraries with React.

hire.lookForTitle: What I am looking for in a position

remoteFirst.title: Remote first/remote friendly
remoteFirst.desc: I work remotely and I look for remote first or remote friendly positions. I'm happy to work in most timezones.

asyncComm.title: Asynchronous communication
asyncComm.desc: Asynchronous communication empowers teams with autonomy for more flexibility and convenience, leading to better documentation and collaboration.

fewerMeetings.title: Fewer meetings
fewerMeetings.desc: Fewer meetings contribute to the effectiveness and autonomy of remote teams, allowing more time for deep work.

positiveCulture.title: Positive, people first, empathetic culture
positiveCulture.desc: A positive company culture is friendly, collaborative, and empathetic, promoting open communication and teamwork.

dataDecisions.title: Decisions based on data
dataDecisions.desc: I believe that decisions should be made based on data and customer feedback, avoiding the sunk cost fallacy.

workLifeBalance.title: Work-life balance
workLifeBalance.desc: We are all human and have lives outside of work. I believe that work-life balance is important to prevent burnout.

hire.connectDesc: If you're interested in discussing potential opportunities or have any inquiries, I'd love to hear from you. Feel free to reach out via email at
hire.cvDetails: Find more details around my background on the web version of my CV at

snippets.subtitle: Code Bits & Bytes
snippets.desc: Explore my collection of practical code snippets for quick integration into your projects.

debounce.title: Debounce in JavaScript
debounce.desc: Create a simple reusable JavaScript function to debounce user input events.

sitemap.title: Generate Sitemap in Next JS
sitemap.desc: A sitemap is essentially a roadmap for search engines, guiding them through the intricate web of your website.

footer.message: It was great having you here, my inbox is always open whether you have a question, a project in mind, or just want to say hi!
